items.title_en: OpenAI's Fidji Simo takes medical leave, announces leadership changes
items.title_zh: OpenAI的Fidji Simo请病假，宣布领导层变动
items.desc_en: OpenAI President Greg Brockman will oversee product in Simo's absence.
items.desc_zh: OpenAI总裁Greg Brockman将在Simo不在时监督产品。

items.title_en: 'Chasing vibes' — OpenAI's M&A strategy gets more confusing with TBPN purchase
items.title_zh: “追逐氛围” --OpenAI的并购策略与TBPN收购变得更加混乱
items.desc_en: Over 10 months after shelling out an eye-popping $6.4 billion for Jony Ive's nascent devices startup, OpenAI announced it's buying media company TBPN.
items.desc_zh: 在为Jony Ive的新兴设备初创公司支付了惊人的64亿美元10个月后， OpenAI宣布将收购媒体公司TBPN。

items.title_en: U.S. fighter jet shot down in Iran, one crew member rescued, MS NOW reports
items.title_zh: 美国战斗机在伊朗被击落，一名机组人员获救， MS现在报道
items.desc_en: It is unclear if the plane was shot down or went down for another reason.
items.desc_zh: 目前尚不清楚飞机是否因其他原因被击落或坠毁。

items.title_en: U.S. judge upholds block on subpoenas to Fed's Powell, teeing up likely appeal
items.title_zh: 美国法官维持对美联储鲍威尔传票的封锁，提起可能的上诉
items.desc_en: A U.S. judge upheld block on subpoenas to Fed's Powell, teeing up a likely appeal.
items.desc_zh: 一名美国法官维持了对美联储鲍威尔传票的阻挠，提出了可能的上诉。

items.title_en: Meta, Google under attack as court cases bypass 30-year-old legal shield
items.title_zh: Meta ，谷歌受到攻击，因为法庭案件绕过了30年的法律保护
items.desc_en: Internet platforms have long been able to rely on special protections to avoid liability for what takes place on their sites. But that may be changing.
items.desc_zh: 互联网平台长期以来一直能够依靠特殊保护来避免对其网站上发生的事情承担责任。但这种情况可能正在发生变化。

items.title_en: Trump threatens to destroy Iranian infrastructure, saying its government 'knows what has to be done'
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁要摧毁伊朗的基础设施，称其政府“知道必须做什么”
items.desc_en: The threat comes a day after he said in a nationwide address that the U.S. military will be hitting Tehran "extremely hard" for the next two or three weeks.
items.desc_zh: 此前一天，他在全国范围内发表讲话说，美国军方将在未来两三周“极其严厉”地打击德黑兰。

items.title_en: I study happiness for a living: The most emotionally secure people share these 7 'quietly powerful' traits
items.title_zh: 我以幸福为生：情绪最安全的人分享这7个“静静地强大”的特质
items.desc_en: Happiness researcher Jessica Weiss reveals the quiet but powerful traits that emotionally secure people have in common.
items.desc_zh: 幸福感研究员杰西卡·韦斯（ Jessica Weiss ）揭示了情绪安全的人们具有的安静但强大的特质。

items.title_en: Wall Street snapped its 5-week losing streak. Here are 3 themes that caught our eye
items.title_zh: 华尔街打破了5周的连败纪录。以下是吸引我们注意的3个主题
items.desc_en: The stock market finally posted its first winning week since the U.S.-Iran war broke out.
items.desc_zh: 股市终于出现了美伊战争爆发以来的首个获胜周。

items.title_en: U.S. payrolls rose by 178,000 in March, more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%
items.title_zh: 美国3月就业人数增加17.8万人，高于预期；失业率为4.3%
items.desc_en: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 59,000 in March, with the unemployment rate holding at 4.4%.
items.desc_zh: 预计3月份非农就业人数将增加59,000人，失业率保持在4.4%。

items.title_en: The cost to fly private is up as much as 20% with fuel prices soaring
items.title_zh: 随着燃油价格飙升，私人飞行的成本高达20 ％
items.desc_en: Deep-pocketed travelers are less likely to get priced out as airfares rise, but they have to navigate unexpected fees related to the Iran war and rising fuel costs.
items.desc_zh: 随着机票价格上涨，财力雄厚的旅行者不太可能被定价，但他们必须应对与伊朗战争和燃料成本上涨相关的意外费用。

items.title_en: Trump is calling for a major increase in defense spending alongside cuts in domestic spending
items.title_zh: 特朗普呼吁在削减国内支出的同时大幅增加国防支出
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump is asking Congress to boost defense spending to $1.5 trillion, the largest such request in decades, according to his budget request.
items.desc_zh: 根据他的预算要求，唐纳德·特朗普总统要求国会将国防开支增加到1.5万亿美元，这是几十年来最大的此类要求。

items.title_en: Investors are waiting for a better place to step in after this week's bounce. Here's what's ahead
items.title_zh: 在本周的反弹之后，投资者正在等待一个更好的地方介入。接下来会发生什么
items.desc_en: There is still a sizeable camp that warn against trading this moment, saying saying equities have to consolidate further before this chapter closes.
items.desc_zh: 仍有一个相当大的阵营警告不要在这一时刻进行交易，称在本章结束之前，股票必须进一步巩固。

items.title_en: United unveils basic Polaris business fare in premium cabin overhaul
items.title_zh: 美联航在高级客舱大修中推出北极星基本商务票价
items.desc_en: United is overhauling its fare classes, offering cheaper business class and premium economy fares that are more restrictive.
items.desc_zh: 美联航正在调整其票价舱位，提供更便宜的商务舱和更严格的豪华经济舱票价。

items.title_en: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
items.title_zh: 特朗普关税影响：一些行业在一年后仍在努力应对挥之不去的影响
items.desc_en: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.
items.desc_zh: 在他的“解放日”一年后，特朗普的贸易战重塑了零售和汽车等行业的公司如何模拟经济和政策风险。

items.title_en: The Tech Download: Defense startups eye Iran war windfall as U.S. and Gulf states turn to tech
items.title_zh: 科技下载：随着美国和海湾国家转向科技，国防创业公司关注伊朗战争的意外收获
items.desc_en: Funding for defense startups has ballooned in recent years as militaries scramble to modernize.
items.desc_zh: 近年来，随着军方争先恐后地进行现代化改造，国防初创企业的资金激增。

items.title_en: One year of 'TACO': How the trade has fared since 'liberation day'
items.title_zh: 一年的“玉米饼” ：自“解放日”以来的贸易状况
items.desc_en: Since “liberation day,” betting on the “Trump Always Chickens Out” theory has been a way to win in the market.
items.desc_zh: 自“解放日”以来，押注“特朗普总是胆小鬼出局”理论一直是赢得市场的一种方式。

items.title_en: Japan's Sakura Internet jumps 20% as Microsoft plans $10 billion AI push with SoftBank
items.title_zh: 日本樱花互联网上涨20% ，微软计划与软银合作推出$ 100亿人工智能
items.desc_en: Microsoft said it plans to invest $10 billion in Japan between 2026 and 2029 to build AI infrastructure.
items.desc_zh: 微软表示，计划在2026年至2029年期间在日本投资100亿美元，用于建设人工智能基础设施。

items.title_en: Chinese chip firms hit record high revenue driven by the AI boom and U.S. curbs
items.title_zh: 中国芯片公司在人工智能繁荣和美国限制的推动下实现创纪录的高收入
items.desc_en: Chinese chip companies have benefited from strong domestic demand for AI as U.S. tech curbs have bolstered local firms.
items.desc_zh: 中国芯片公司受益于国内对人工智能的强劲需求，因为美国的技术限制提振了当地公司。

items.title_en: Microsoft executive touts Copilot sales traction as AI anxiety weighs on stock
items.title_zh: 微软高管吹捧Copilot销售牵引力，因为人工智能焦虑对股票造成压力
items.desc_en: Analysts have said adoption of the $30-per-month Microsoft 365 Copilot is in the early stage.
items.desc_zh: 分析师表示，采用每月30 $的Microsoft 365 Copilot尚处于早期阶段。

items.title_en: Coinbase clears key regulatory hurdle in bid to bolster its stablecoin business
items.title_zh: Coinbase清除了关键的监管障碍，以支持其稳定币业务
items.desc_en: Coinbase has received conditional approval from the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to operate as a trust bank, the company said Thursday.
items.desc_zh: Coinbase周四表示，该公司已获得美国货币监理署的有条件批准，可以作为信托银行运营。

items.title_en: Tesla's stock suffers steepest drop of 2026 on disappointing deliveries report
items.title_zh: 由于交货报告令人失望，特斯拉的股价在2026年跌幅最大
items.desc_en: Tesla is coming off a year of declining deliveries due in part to increased competition from rivals in China offering lower-cost models.
items.desc_zh: 特斯拉今年的交付量出现下滑，部分原因是来自提供低成本车型的中国竞争对手的竞争加剧。

items.title_en: Blue Owl caps private credit funds redemptions at 5% after steep request levels
items.title_zh: Blue Owl在陡峭的请求水平后将私人信贷资金赎回上限定为5%
items.desc_en: Blue Owl attributed the higher-than-usual requests to "heightened market concerns around AI-related disruption to software companies."
items.desc_zh: Blue Owl将高于平常的要求归因于“市场对软件公司人工智能相关中断的担忧加剧”。

items.title_en: The March jobs report will be released on Friday. Here's what to expect
items.title_zh: 3月份的就业报告将于周五发布。接下来会发生什么
items.desc_en: The U.S. economy is projected to show job gains of 59,000 in March, with the unemployment rate holding at 4.4%.
items.desc_zh: 预计3月份美国经济将增加59,000个就业岗位，失业率保持在4.4%。

items.title_en: OpenAI acquires popular tech podcast TBPN
items.title_zh: OpenAI收购热门科技播客TBPN
items.desc_en: OpenAI did not disclose the terms of the deal but said TBPN will be housed within its strategy organization.
items.desc_zh: OpenAI没有披露交易条款，但表示TBPN将被纳入其战略组织。

items.title_en: Amazon to add 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge for sellers as Iran war drives up energy prices
items.title_zh: 随着伊朗战争推高能源价格，亚马逊将为卖家增加3.5%的燃料和物流附加费
items.desc_en: With the Iran war now in its fifth week, Amazon said it's adding a 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge for third-party sellers in the U.S. and Canada.
items.desc_zh: 随着伊朗战争现已进入第五周，亚马逊表示将为美国和加拿大的第三方卖家增加3.5%的燃油和物流附加费。

items.title_en: Family offices stall deal-making during Iran conflict
items.title_zh: 家族办公室在伊朗冲突期间搁置交易
items.desc_en: While global uncertainty has weighed on deal count, family offices and corporate investors are still piling into megadeals.
items.desc_zh: 尽管全球的不确定性拖累了交易数量，但家族办公室和企业投资者仍在涌入巨额交易。

items.title_en: Trump's address, SpaceX IPO, Sam's Club membership prices and more in Morning Squawk
items.title_zh: 《Morning Squawk》中的特朗普地址、SpaceX IPO、Sam's Club会员价格等
items.desc_en: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.
items.desc_zh: 以下是投资者在开始交易日时需要了解的五个关键事项。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Exxon Mobil, Carnival, Delta, General Motors and more
items.title_zh: 上市前规模最大的股票：埃克森美孚（ Exxon Mobil ）、嘉年华（ Carnival ）、达美（ Delta ）、通用汽车（ General
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前市场上涨幅度最大的股票。

items.title_en: Huawei's cloud computing revenue dropped in 2025 as Chinese AI lagged U.S. rivals
items.title_zh: 由于中国人工智能落后于美国竞争对手，华为的云计算收入在2025年下降
items.desc_en: When including internal customers, the telecommunications giant said cloud computing revenue grew from a year ago.
items.desc_zh: 当包括内部客户时，这家电信巨头表示，云计算收入比一年前有所增长。

items.title_en: Globalstar stock surges 15% on report Amazon is weighing an acquisition
items.title_zh: Globalstar股价飙升15% ，报告称亚马逊正在权衡一项收购
items.desc_en: A deal with Globalstar could bolster Amazon Leo, the company's nascent internet-from-space service, which has about 200 satellites in orbit.
items.desc_zh: 与Globalstar的交易可能会加强亚马逊LEO ，这是该公司新兴的太空互联网服务，该服务在轨道上有大约200颗卫星。

items.title_en: Franklin Templeton acquires digital assets investment firm in active crypto management push
items.title_zh: 富兰克林邓普顿收购数字资产投资公司，积极推动加密货币管理
items.desc_en: Franklin Templeton has agreed to buy 250 Digital, which will join the newly established unit Franklin Crypto, as the firm deepens its digital assets push.
items.desc_zh: 富兰克林·邓普顿（ Franklin Templeton ）已同意收购250 Digital ，该公司将加入新成立的富兰克林加密部门，因为该公司正在加深其数字资产的推动力。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Eli Lilly, Hasbro, Philip Morris, Intel, Micron & more
items.title_zh: 股市午间波动最大：礼来、孩之宝、菲利普莫里斯、英特尔、美光等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in midday trading.
items.desc_zh: 这些是中午交易中涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Private sector hiring totaled 62,000 in March, better than expected, ADP says
items.title_zh: ADP表示， 3月私营部门招聘总人数为62,000人，好于预期
items.desc_en: Private sector employment growth kept pace, but health care and construction continued to provide nearly all the momentum.
items.desc_zh: 私营部门就业增长保持同步，但医疗保健和建筑业继续提供几乎所有的动力。

items.title_en: Visa launches new AI tools to manage the charge dispute process
items.title_zh: Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程
items.desc_en: Visa's new tools are part of a larger push by major banks and financial institutions to incorporate AI into their businesses.
items.desc_zh: Visa的新工具是主要银行和金融机构将人工智能融入其业务的更大推动力的一部分。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Nike, RH, Sandisk & more
items.title_zh: 股票在盘前走势最大：耐克、RH、桑迪斯克等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: Nike, Dave & Buster's, RH and more
items.title_zh: 下班后股市走势最大：耐克、戴夫和巴斯特、RH等
items.desc_en: See which stocks are posting big moves after the bell.
items.desc_zh: 查看哪些股票在铃声过后出现大幅波动。

items.title_en: While low-income consumers struggle with rising gas prices, higher earners grow nervous as markets fall
items.title_zh: 虽然低收入消费者难以应对汽油价格上涨，但随着市场下跌，高收入者会变得紧张
items.desc_en: Bank of America data reveals lower-income consumers are already pulling back on spending. Consumer sentiment shows higher earners are feeling less confident.
items.desc_zh: 美国银行的数据显示，低收入消费者已经开始减少支出。消费者情绪表明，收入较高的人感觉不太自信。

items.title_en: Why $4 a gallon gas prices won’t trigger Fed interest rate hikes — and could lead to cuts
items.title_zh: 为什么每加仑汽油价格4 $不会引发美联储加息—并可能导致降息
items.desc_en: While there's still plenty of uncertainty about where rates are headed, Wall Street commentary shifted back to expectations for cuts.
items.desc_zh: 虽然利率走向仍存在很大的不确定性，但华尔街的评论又回到了降息的预期。

items.title_en: Warren Buffett says Iran bomb would make nuclear disaster harder to avoid
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，伊朗核弹将使避免核灾难变得更加困难
items.desc_en: The Berkshire Hathaway chairman said the growing number of nuclear-armed states has fundamentally altered the global risk landscape.
items.desc_zh: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司董事长表示，越来越多的核武国家从根本上改变了全球风险格局。

items.title_en: Warren Buffett teams up with NBA superstar Stephen Curry for charity lunch, reviving iconic auction
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特（ Warren Buffett ）与NBA超级巨星斯蒂芬·库里（ Stephen Curry ）合作进行慈善午餐，恢复标志性
items.desc_en: The winning bidder — along with up to seven guests — will join Buffett and the Currys for an exclusive lunch in Omaha, Nebraska.
items.desc_zh: 中标者以及最多七位客人将与巴菲特和咖喱一起在内布拉斯加州奥马哈享用独家午餐。

items.title_en: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特（ Warren Buffett ）表示，他卖掉苹果太快，并将购买更多苹果，尽管不是在这个市场
items.desc_en: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.
items.desc_zh: 苹果公司仍然是伯克希尔哈撒韦公司最大的控股公司，即使该集团在去年年底削减了股份。

items.title_en: Warren Buffett says he's still making calls on investments at Berkshire, flags 'tiny' new buy
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特（ Warren Buffett ）表示，他仍在伯克希尔哈撒韦公司（ Berkshire ）进行投资，标志着“微小”
items.desc_en: The 95-year-old investor said he still comes into the office daily and stays engaged with markets.
items.desc_zh: 这位95岁的投资者表示，他仍然每天都来办公室，并与市场保持联系。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: McCormick, Diageo, Nvidia & more
items.title_zh: 股票在盘前走势最大：麦考密克、帝亚吉欧、英伟达等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Three niche commodity prices are surging. What they show about China's grip on supply chains
items.title_zh: 三个利基商品价格正在飙升。他们展示了中国对供应链的控制
items.desc_en: In the wake of the Iran war, prices are surging for critical elements used in defense and the semiconductors that power artificial intelligence advances.
items.desc_zh: 在伊朗战争之后，用于国防的关键元素的价格飙升，为人工智能提供动力的半导体也在进步。

items.title_en: Evercore ISI predicts 'inflection point' is days away, plans to commit capital if S&P 500 drops to this level
items.title_zh: Evercore ISI预测距离“拐点”还有几天，如果标准普尔500指数跌至这一水平，计划投入资金
items.desc_en: A week of "maximum uncertainty" should deliver a key opportunity for investors, according to Evercore ISI's Julian Emanuel.
items.desc_zh: Evercore ISI的朱利安·伊曼纽尔（ Julian Emanuel ）表示，一周的“最大不确定性”应为投资者提供关键机会。

items.title_en: China suppliers warn of higher prices for Americans due to Strait of Hormuz closure
items.title_zh: 中国供应商警告说，由于霍尔木兹海峡关闭，美国人的价格会上涨
items.desc_en: The Iran war has stalled shipments of oil and its products through the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns among Chinese manufacturers about supply chain disruptions.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗战争阻碍了通过霍尔木兹海峡的石油及其产品的运输，引发了中国制造商对供应链中断的担忧。

items.title_en: New fees, fewer flights: Higher fuel prices pinch consumer budgets beyond the gas pump
items.title_zh: 新的费用，更少的航班：更高的燃油价格使消费者的预算超出了加油站的范围
items.desc_en: As corporate policies change, Americans will feel higher oil prices in their wallets beyond the gas pump.
items.desc_zh: 随着企业政策的变化，美国人将在加油站以外的钱包中感受到更高的油价。

items.title_en: Markets now see the Fed's next move as a potential rate hike as inflation fears mount
items.title_zh: 随着通胀担忧加剧，市场现在将美联储的下一步行动视为潜在的加息
items.desc_en: Traders in the futures market shifted the probability of a rate increase by the end of 2026 to 52% on Friday morning.
items.desc_zh: 周五上午，期货市场的交易员将2026年底加息的可能性提高到52%。

items.title_en: China industrial profits surge 15% to start year, but oil price shock threatens outlook
items.title_zh: 中国工业利润年初飙升15% ，但油价冲击威胁前景
items.desc_en: Soaring energy prices are expected to impact China's economy less than most other countries, due to its massive oil reserves and alternative energy sources.
items.desc_zh: 由于其庞大的石油储量和替代能源，预计能源价格飙升对中国经济的影响将小于其他大多数国家。

items.title_en: Global forecasting group sees U.S. inflation at 4.2% this year, much higher than Fed estimate
items.title_zh: 全球预测组织认为，今年美国通胀率为4.2% ，远高于美联储的估计
items.desc_en: The forecast is a sharp step up from the prior projection of 2.8%. Moreover, it is much higher than the 2.7% Fed officials estimated.
items.desc_zh: 该预测比之前预测的2.8%大幅上升。此外，它远高于美联储官员估计的2.7%。

items.title_en: Recession odds climb on Wall Street as economy shows cracks beneath the surface
items.title_zh: 随着经济显示出表面下的裂缝，华尔街的经济衰退几率攀升
items.desc_en: Economists have pulled up their risk assessments of a contraction amid heightened uncertainty over geopolitical risk and a labor market slump.
items.desc_zh: 由于地缘政治风险的不确定性加剧和劳动力市场暴跌，经济学家提高了对经济萎缩的风险评估。

items.title_en: European Central Bank holds rates steady, warns outlook is 'significantly more uncertain'
items.title_zh: 欧洲央行维持利率稳定，警告前景“更加不确定”
items.desc_en: The war in Iran has upset the economic equilibrium Europe threatening energy supplies, growth and the outlook for consumer prices, upsetting economic forecasts.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗战争扰乱了欧洲的经济平衡，威胁到能源供应、增长和消费者价格前景，扰乱了经济预测。

items.title_en: Don't be fooled by the UK's pre-war inflation print — a 'brutal' surge could be coming
items.title_zh: 不要被英国战前的通胀印记所愚弄— “残酷”的激增可能即将到来
items.desc_en: The U.K. inflation rate stood firm at 3% in February, according to the latest figures from the Office for National Statistics (ONS).
items.desc_zh: 根据国家统计局（ ONS ）的最新数据， 2月份英国通货膨胀率稳定在3%。

items.title_en: White House to pay TotalEnergies $1 billion to kill off East Coast wind farm projects
items.title_zh: 白宫向道达尔能源支付10亿美元（ $ 10亿） ，以扼杀东海岸风电场项目
items.desc_en: The announcement comes as the Iran war disrupts global oil and gas supplies, making the U.S.' development of its LNG resources more urgent.
items.desc_zh: 这一消息发布之际，伊朗战争扰乱了全球石油和天然气供应，使美国开发液化天然气资源变得更加紧迫。

items.title_en: Elizabeth Warren demands answers on costs, economic impact of 'illegal and reckless war'
items.title_zh: 伊丽莎白·沃伦（ Elizabeth Warren ）要求回答“非法和鲁莽的战争”的成本和经济影响
items.desc_en: The liberal Democratic firebrand ripped President Donald Trump, whom she said has 'dragged the United States into an illegal and reckless war.'
items.desc_zh: 自由民主党的煽动者撕裂了唐纳德·特朗普总统，她说唐纳德·特朗普“将美国拖入了一场非法和鲁莽的战争”。

items.title_en: Traders now see little chance of an interest rate cut this year following Fed decision
items.title_zh: 在美联储做出决定后，交易员现在几乎看不到今年降息的可能性
items.desc_en: All of the positive economic talk out of this week's Federal Reserve meeting had a negative impact on investors
items.desc_zh: 本周美联储会议的所有积极经济谈话都对投资者产生了负面影响
